description_long: This object is a group of five packaged snack and condiment items, each with distinct branding and packaging. At the center is a tall rectangular Alpro Soya Light carton, predominantly white with blue and green accents, featuring a screw cap on top. To its right is a Heinz Tomato Ketchup squeeze bottle, with a red body and white cap, displaying the iconic Heinz label. On the left is a glass jar with a white lid, labeled as a vegan mayonnaise or salad dressing, with green and yellow graphics. In the foreground, there is a rectangular black plastic tub with a colorful, playful design, partially open to reveal a pale spread inside, and its matching lid placed nearby. The items are arranged with clear, legible branding and nutritional information visible on several packages. The materials include plastic, glass, paperboard, and metal, with glossy and matte finishes.
description: A group of five branded snack and condiment packages, including a soya drink carton, ketchup bottle, glass jar, and a black plastic tub with a spread, all with colorful labels and visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five items: the Alpro Soya Light carton, Heinz ketchup bottle, glass jar, and the open black tub with its lid, with branding and labels clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the nutritional and ingredient information on the Alpro carton, the back of the ketchup bottle, and the side of the glass jar, with the open tub and lid in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the Alpro carton with detailed nutrition facts, the back of the ketchup bottle, and the rear of the glass jar, with the tub and lid partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side of the Alpro carton with additional product information, the side of the glass jar, and the open tub with its lid, highlighting the spread inside.
attribute_brand_logo: Visible brand logos include 'alpro' on the front of the soya drink carton (blue and green text, leaf graphic), 'Heinz' on the ketchup bottle (white label with red and green details), and other logos on the jar and tub, all located on the front-facing labels.
attribute_packaging_type: carton with screw cap, plastic squeeze bottle, glass jar with lid, plastic tub with lid
attribute_flavor_indication: The Alpro carton indicates 'Soya Light', the ketchup bottle shows a tomato graphic, and the tub has text and graphics suggesting a plant-based or vegan spread. The jar has images of vegetables and herbs. No explicit flavor names are visible except for 'Soya Light' and 'Tomato'.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible on the back of the Alpro carton and the ketchup bottle, including a nutrition facts panel and ingredient lists.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The black tub features playful, colorful graphics and text such as '100% SMEREN ZONDER PALMOLIE' and 'CUPCAKES FREE OF PALM', but no mascots or special offers are visible.
